[Helper] Prepare for your next meeting: agenda, attendees, and linked docs

Usage: gws +meeting-prep [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --calendar <ID>        Calendar ID (default: primary) [default: primary]
      --sanitize <TEMPLATE>  Sanitize API responses through a Model Armor template. Requires cloud-platform scope. Format: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/templates/TEMPLATE. Also reads GWS_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE env var.
      --dry-run              Validate the request locally without sending it to the API
      --format <FORMAT>      Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
  -h, --help                 Print help

EXAMPLES:
  gws workflow +meeting-prep
  gws workflow +meeting-prep --calendar Work

TIPS:
  Read-only — never modifies data.
  Shows the next upcoming event with attendees and description.
